tool.read_file.desc: Read a file's content from the local file system
tool.write_file.desc: Write plain text content to a file
tool.edit_file.desc: Edit a text file by replacing a specific string
tool.file_system_overview.desc: Get an overview of the local file system
tool.memory.desc: Manage memory in conversations. Supports add, delete, and search
tool.variable.desc: Manage variables in conversations. Supports get, set, delete, list, and search
panel.api_settings.desc: Configure LLM API connection parameters and model selection
panel.embedding_api_config.desc: Configure the OpenAI style embedding API connection settings
panel.qdrant_api_config.desc: Configure the Qdrant API connection settings
panel.dyn_prompt.desc: Manage and edit DynPrompt sets and prompts
panel.example.desc: This is an example plugin panel
panel.file_system.desc: Configure file system AllowList and BanList access rules
panel.dataset_export.desc: Export conversations with optional context modifier application
panel.regex_modifier.desc: Configure Regex sets for the Regex Render Modifier
panel.sub_agent_config.desc: Configure sub-agents for advanced Agentic workflows
panel.agent_variable.desc: Manage global variables for the current agent
panel.variable.desc: Manage variables in conversations, supports Agent and Chat scopes
node.api_select.desc: Choose which API configuration to use for generation
node.append_chat_messages.desc: Append chat history messages from SharedState into context fragments
node.call_preset.desc: Load and execute a preset from Generation Manager
node.dyn_prompt.desc: Evaluate DynPrompt trigger rules and inject matching prompts
node.merge_fragments.desc: Merge all context fragments into a single fragment with the selected role
node.message_print_latest.desc: Print the latest fragment's message content to console
node.message_print.desc: Print context fragments as JSON to console
node.message_print_v2.desc: Print context fragments with ANSI role-based coloring to console
node.print.desc: Print a template to console with {time} and {total_len} macro support
node.st_style_macro.desc: Replace {{user}} and {{char}} macros in fragment message contents
node.tool_preset.desc: Load a tool preset from ToolManager
node.file_system_tool_set.desc: Select FileSystem tools to enable and configure file access scope (Override/Union/Intersection with global config)
prop.call_node.preset_id.hint: ID of the generation preset to inline
prop.dyn_prompt.set_name.hint: Name of the DynPromptSet to use. Leave empty to use all sets
prop.dyn_prompt.role.hint: Role for injected fragments (system / user / assistant)
prop.fragment.content.hint: The text content to inject into the context
prop.fragment_trim.token_budget.hint: Max tokens before trimming from head
prop.fragment_trim.count.hint: Messages to keep in LatestN mode
prop.if_node.source.hint: Where to read the left-hand value from
prop.if_node.value.hint: Right-hand value. Numeric or string, auto-detected.
prop.if_node.on_convert_fail.hint: Behavior when source returns null or empty
prop.adv_if.condition.hint: C# boolean expression. Globals: Fragments (List<ContextSegment>), SharedState (Dictionary<string,object>), KVData (IKVDataService). Preset usings: System.Linq, SharperLLM.Util, System.Collections.Generic.
prop.memory_retrieve.recent_messages.hin: Number of recent messages used for memory search
prop.merge_fragments.target_role.hint: Role assigned to the merged fragment
prop.message_print_v2.ignore_null_proper: Skip properties whose value is null or empty
prop.message_print_v2.colorize_tool_args: Apply JSON syntax coloring to tool call arguments
prop.sequence.repeat.hint: Number of times to repeat the sequence
prop.sub_agent.output_mode.hint: LastMessage, FullJson, or None. Overrides config if set
prop.sub_agent.shared_guid.hint: When enabled, the sub-agent inherits the parent AgentGuid. When disabled, uses the config GUID as an independent identity.
prop.tool_preset.preset_name.hint: Leave empty to use the default preset, or enter a preset name to match
prop.fs_tool_set.enable_overview.hint: Enable the file system overview tool
prop.fs_tool_set.allow_list.hint: One regex pattern per line. If empty, all paths are allowed.
prop.fs_tool_set.ban_list.hint: One regex pattern per line. BanList takes precedence over AllowList.
prop.fs_tool_set.scope_mode.hint: How to merge with the global FileSystem config
editor.call_node.label: Preset
editor.call_node.no_presets: No presets found. Create one in the Generation Manager.
panel_dynprompt.title: DynPrompt Editor
panel_dynprompt.no_sets: No DynPromptSets yet. Create a new one.
panel_dynprompt.no_terms: This set has no dynamic prompts yet. Add one.
panel_dynprompt.label_inject_depth: Injection Depth (only effective when mode is AtDepth):
panel_dynprompt.trigger_rule_placeholder: Enter trigger rule, leave empty to always trigger
panel_dynprompt.msg_invalid_set_name: Please enter a valid set name
panel_dynprompt.msg_confirm_delete_set: Are you sure you want to delete set '{0}'? This will delete all related dynamic prompts.
panel_dynprompt.msg_confirm_delete_term: Are you sure you want to delete prompt '{0}'?
panel_dynprompt.msg_term_trigger_error: Trigger rule syntax error in prompt '{0}'
panel_variable.no_variables: No variables yet. Click add button above.
panel_variable.msg_invalid_format: Value format is incorrect, unable to convert to {0} type
panel_agent_variable.no_variables: No agent variables yet. Click add button above.
panel_agent_variable.msg_invalid_format: Value format is incorrect, unable to convert to {0} type
panel_filesystem.title: File System Access Control
panel_filesystem.desc: Configure regex-based AllowList and BanList patterns to control which paths the File System tools can access.
panel_filesystem.allowlist_desc: Regex patterns for paths that are explicitly allowed. One pattern per line. If empty, all non-banned paths are allowed.
panel_filesystem.banlist_desc: Regex patterns for paths that are always denied. One pattern per line. BanList takes precedence over AllowList.
panel_filesystem.test_path_placeholder: Enter a path to test against the rules...
panel_filesystem.msg_path_required: Please enter a path to test.
panel_filesystem.msg_test_blocked_no_mat: BLOCKED - Did not match any AllowList pattern. (Full path: {0})
panel_filesystem.msg_reset: Form reset to defaults. Click Save to persist.
panel_subagent.title: SubAgent Configuration
panel_subagent.desc: Configure sub-agents for use with the SubAgentGeneration context modifier.
panel_subagent.output_help: Last Message: returns only the final AI message text. Full JSON: serializes the entire sub-agent interaction (AI + tool calls + results). None: sub-agent executes silently, no output is returned to parent.
panel_subagent.select_preset_hint: Select a preset from Generation Manager.
panel_subagent.private_tree_hint: This sub-agent has a custom modifier tree.
panel_subagent.minimal_hint: Runs with no system prompt or modifiers — just the task and tools.
panel_subagent.post_tree_hint: Execute post-generation pipeline on the sub-agent's LLM response before formatting output.
panel_subagent.post_tree_private_hint: This sub-agent has a custom post-generation tree.
panel_subagent.post_tree_minimal_hint: No post-processing: raw LLM response is used directly.
panel_toolmanager.title: Tool Manager
panel_toolmanager.available_tools_desc: Enable tools here, then use Tool Preset node in Generation Manager to load them.
panel_regex.title: Regex Sets
panel_regex.no_rules: No rules defined in this set.
panel_regex.select_hint: Select a Regex Set to edit, or create a new one.
panel_example.title: Example Plugin Panel
panel_example.desc: This is an example plugin panel to demonstrate how to create and use plugin panel functionality.
panel_example.feature_dynamic_render: Can be dynamically rendered in the application
node_err.api_no_continuation: APISelect: Continuation requested but API type '{0}' does not support prefix continuation.
node_err.call_no_presets: CallNode: No generation presets found in KVData.
node_err.call_empty_json: CallNode: Generation preset '{0}' has empty RootNodeJson.
node_err.call_deserialize_failed: CallNode: Failed to deserialize root node from preset '{0}'.
node_err.dynprompt_parse_failed: DynPrompt: Failed to parse DynPromptSets from KVData.
node_err.dynprompt_trigger_eval_failed: DynPrompt: Failed to evaluate trigger rule for term '{0}'.
node_err.subagent_no_tree: SubAgent: No modifier tree configured for '{0}'. Assign a preset or create a private tree.
node_err.tool_instantiate_type_not_found: ToolInstantiate: Type '{0}' not found or does not implement IAutoCreateToolV2.
node_err.tool_instantiate_create_failed: ToolInstantiate: Failed to create instance of '{0}'.
editor_subagent.select_hint: Select a SubAgent configuration from the list
editor_subagent.label: SubAgent
editor_subagent.no_configs: No SubAgent configurations found. Create one in the SubAgent Configuration panel.
builtin.regex_render_modifier.name: Regex Replacement
builtin.regex_render_modifier.desc: Applies a set of Regex replacement rules to the message content. Input: Name of the Regex Set to apply.
node.post_sub_agent.desc: Process LLM response text using a sub-agent in the post-generation pipeline
prop.post_sub_agent.output_mode.hint: LastMessage, FullJson, or None. Overrides config if set
prop.post_sub_agent.include_full_context: When enabled, passes the full conversation history (PreFragments) along with the LLM response to the sub-agent. When disabled, only the LLM response text is passed.
